# Lecture 10: Difference-in-Difference {#lecture10}

## Slides{.unnumbered}

- 10 Difference-in-Difference ([link](https://github.com/svallejovera/regression_ci/blob/main/slide/9_Interpretation.pptx)) 

No fancy code from this Lecture :( ... 

```{r week10slides, echo=FALSE,fig.align = 'center', out.width = "100%", fig.cap = "Slides for 9 The Multiple Regression Model: Interpretation."}
knitr::include_graphics("slide/9_Interpretation.pdf")
```
